hooks.command:
echo 'ENGINEERING STANDARDS REMINDER — before planning:
• Root cause only. No bandaids.
• Read all relevant code before designing a solution.
• One right solution, not three adequate ones. Pick the approach that holds in 6 months and explain why.
• User experience is the final arbiter of every decision.
• Types everywhere. No any. Error states are first-class. Name things for what they do.
• Prefer elegant. Complexity must earn its place.'

echo 'DOC UPDATE REMINDER — if you shipped changes this session (new agents, YAML schemas, web app code, or system files):
• Update the build state table in PLAN.md (mark completed items ✅, update phase status)
• Update any stale sections of CLAUDE.md (routing table, delivery table, directory structure, build state)
• Log any new core/ writes in core/system-intelligence/changelog.md
If docs are already current, no action needed.'
